config.adaptivemobai.option.loadout.empt: bartay: isticmaal kaydka hubka uu moodku bartay
config.adaptivemobai.option.loadout.defa: caadi: hay hubka hadda uu mobku wato
config.adaptivemobai.option.loadout.none: midna: ku qas inuu soo baxo isaga oo aan hub wadan
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.root.mob_ai: U fur dejimaha mob kasta u gaar ah makhluuqaadka vanilla. Dooro mob, dabadeed hagaaji AI-ga iyo habdhaqanka loadout-ka.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.root.advanc: Dejimaha u fur mobs modded. Halkan ka eeg astaamaha xeeladeed ee si toos ah loo qoondeeyay iyo overrides-ka mob kasta.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.root.disabl: Daar ama demi dhammaan loadout-yada hubka ee caalamiga ah. Marka la demiyo, xeerarka caadiga ah ee loadout-ka Adaptive Mob AI way sii jiraan. Marka la daaro, mobs-ku waxay haystaan qalabkooda vanilla. Dejintan si caadi ah waa dansan tahay waxaana dib loo rarayaa isla markiiba.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.common.back: Ku laabo boggii qaabeynta ee hore.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.common.canc: Xir shaashaddan adigoon kaydin isbeddellada hadda jira.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.advanced.au: Marka tani shaqaynayso, entities modded ee aan lahayn override gacanta ah si toos ah ayaa loogu qoondeeyaa profile xeeladeed ku habboon.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.load: Fur tifaftiraha loadout-ka hubka. Doorashada bartay waxay isticmaashaa kaydka hubka ee moodku bartay, doorashada caadi waxay haynaysaa hubka hadda uu mobku wato, halka doorashada midna ay ku qasbayso inuu soo baxo isaga oo aan hub wadan.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.enha: U beddel mob-kan inta u dhaxaysa habdhaqanka Adaptive Mob AI iyo AI-ga caadiga ah ee vanilla.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.tact: U deji tactic profile override mob-kan ama u daa moodka inuu si toos ah kuugu doorto.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.single.clea: Ka saar tactic profile-ka gacanta lagu dejiyay oo ku noqo doorashada caadiga ah ama doorashada tooska ah.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.we: Dooro booska hubka %s. Doorashada bartay waxay isticmaashaa kaydka hubka ee moodku bartay, doorashada caadi waxay haynaysaa hubka hadda uu mobku wato, halka doorashada midna ay ku qasbayso inuu soo baxo isaga oo aan hub wadan.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.de: Dooro fallaarta caadiga ah ee la siiyo mobs-ka qaansada ama crossbow-ga marka uusan jirin arrow override gaar ah oo mob-kaas loogu talagalay.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.mo: U deji arrow ama crossbow ammo override mob-ka la doortay oo keliya. Sida caadiga ah waxaa la isticmaalaa dejinta fallaarta guud.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.sa: Ku qor dejimaha loadout-ka hadda jira adaptivemobai-common.toml oo isla markiiba dib u rar.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.loadouts.ca: Xir tifaftiraha loadout-ka adigoon kaydin isbeddellada hadda jira.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.ove: Daar ama demi nidaamka AI override ee mob kasta.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.sho: Beddel haddii aqoonsiyada entities vanilla lagu muujinayo liiska iyaga oo la socda kuwa modded.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.set: Ku qas mob-ka la doortay inuu hayo AI-ga vanilla. Adaptive Mob AI ma gelin doonto yoolalkeeda dagaalka.
Ku qas mob-ka la doortay inuu isticmaalo habdhaqanka Adaptive Mob AI.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.per_mob.cle: Ka saar AI override-ka mob-ka la doortay oo ku noqo habdhaqanka caadiga ah ee moodka.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.mapp: Maamul sida entities modded loogu xiro profiles xeeladeed.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.auto: Marka tani shaqaynayso, entities modded ee aan lahayn override gacanta ah si toos ah ayaa loogu qoondeeyaa profile xeeladeed ku habboon.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.show: Beddel haddii entities vanilla lagu muujinayo liiskan iyaga oo la socda kuwa modded.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.set_: U qoondee entity-ga la doortay profile xeeladeed gaar ah.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.clea: Ka saar tactical override-ka entity-ga la doortay oo ku noqo habdhaqan toos ah ama caadi ah.
config.adaptivemobai.tooltip.modded.defa: Dooro profile xeeladeed kayd ah oo loogu talagalay mobs modded ee cadowga ah marka aysan jirin is-waafajin dhow.
Dooro profile xeeladeed kayd ah oo loogu talagalay mobs modded ee deggan marka aysan jirin is-waafajin dhow.
